name: Nahargarh Stepwell Sunrise Point
description: A lesser-known stepwell near Nahargarh Fort offering panoramic sunrise views over the Pink City, almost empty before 8 AM.

name: Sireh Deori Bazaar Rooftop Cafe
description: A locals-only rooftop cafe behind Hawa Sadak serving masala chai with a direct view of the City Palace, rarely visited by tourists.

name: LMB Street Food Walk
description: A stretch of stalls near Johari Bazaar known for pyaaz kachori and lassi, best experienced early evening on weekdays.

name: Panna Meena Ka Kund Stepwell
description: A quiet symmetrical stepwell near Amer Fort, far less crowded than the fort itself and excellent for architectural photography.

name: Anokhi Museum of Hand Printing
description: A small museum and working studio in a restored haveli showing traditional block-printing techniques, with live artisan demos.

name: Sambhar Lake Sunset Point
description: India's largest saline lake, roughly an hour from the city, known for flamingo sightings and dramatic sunset colors on the salt flats.

name: Sisodia Rani Garden
description: A terraced Rajput garden with fountains and murals, quiet on weekday mornings and a favorite of local photography students.

name: Masala Chowk Local Food Hub
description: A curated open-air food court near Albert Hall run by local vendors, cheaper and less touristy than nearby restaurants.
